home.hero_description: Axyron is a task and project manager that helps teams stay focused and ship faster.
home.features_subtitle: Powerful tools built for modern teams — from solo freelancers to enterprise organizations.
home.cta_description: Join thousands of teams already using Axyron to manage work and ship faster.

task_management.title: Task Management
task_management.description: Create, assign, and prioritize tasks with deadlines, labels, and custom workflows.

project_tracking.title: Project Tracking
project_tracking.description: Track milestones, manage sprints, and visualize project progress from start to finish.

calendar.title: Calendar View
calendar.description: Plan your week and month with a unified calendar across all your projects and tasks.

analytics.title: Analytics & Charts
analytics.description: Get insights into team velocity, task completion rates, and project health over time.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.description: Schedule, organize, and manage team meetings with integrated calendars and reminders.

multilang.title: Multi-language Support
multilang.description: Work in your preferred language. Axyron supports multiple locales for global teams.
